reviews.comment:
40 minutos de espera para que descargue el camión, nos tuvimos que retirar si cargar.
Es muy poco común que descargues el camión de día, eran las 3 de la tarde, a mi entender se hace de madrugada, cuando hay menos afluencia de público.
Perdes más ventas a las 3 de la tarde, que a las 3 de la madruga.

(Translated by Google)
We waited 40 minutes for the truck to unload, so we had to leave without loading.
It's very unusual to unload the truck during the day; it was 3 PM. In my opinion, it's usually done in the early morning hours when there are fewer people around. You lose more sales at 3 PM than at 3 AM.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhcGJPc1B3EAE
